title: 🌸 Official Invitation (Formal)
body:
🌸 *AKSHAY WEDS HIMANSHI* 🌸

Dear {name},

We cordially invite you and your family to grace the auspicious occasion of our wedding union.

📅 *Date:* July 7th, 2026
📍 *Venue:* Taj Palace, Chanakyapuri, New Delhi

Please find our digital invitation card with complete details, venue itinerary, and RSVP here:
🔗 http://localhost:3000

We eagerly await your presence to bless us.

Warm regards,
*Akshay & Himanshi*

title: 🕺 Sangeet Invitation (Friendly/Vibrant)
body:
✨ *Time to dance! Akshay & Himanshi Sangeet* ✨

Hey {name}!

Get ready to put on your dancing shoes! We invite you to join us for our Sangeet Night full of music, dance, and celebration.

📅 *Date:* July 6th, 2026 • 7:00 PM
📍 *Venue:* Grand Ballroom, Taj Palace, New Delhi

Check out the full itinerary and add your favorite song to our Sangeet Playlist here:
🔗 http://localhost:3000

See you there!
*Akshay & Himanshi*

title: 🥂 Reception Invitation (Elegant)
body:
🥂 *Akshay & Himanshi — Wedding Reception* 🥂

Dear {name},

Please join us to celebrate our first evening as husband and wife at our Wedding Reception.

📅 *Date:* July 8th, 2026 • 7:30 PM onwards
📍 *Venue:* The Mughal Gardens, Taj Palace, New Delhi

Digital Invite & Venue Directions:
🔗 http://localhost:3000

Looking forward to celebrating with you!
*Akshay & Himanshi*
